# This directory is the local output target for `npm run archive`.
#
# Contents (all auto-generated on each archive run, all gitignored):
#   - tasks.json     per-session task records
#   - stats.json     aggregate dashboard source
#   - search.md      full-text search index grouped by day
#   - index.json     local-only fingerprint cache (kept here, never exposed via console)
#   - patterns.json  rule-based analysis output (npm run summarize)
#
# After the very first `npm run archive` the files above will appear here.
# Before that, this directory is empty by design.
